creator: freebsd@nevar.pl
text:
After updating encfs to fusefs-encfs-1.8.1 I have problems with handling encrypted fs. I am able to mount my disk but I can't create any files in encrypted drive. This is strange because I actually can create directories in it.
Everything was working on the previous version fusefs-encfs-1.7.4_7.
This happens not only with my old encrypted drive but with newly created also.

system: 10.3-RELEASE
all other ports are updated by portmaster -a
